Container.Name: BudgetApp
Container.Overview:
BudgetApp is a secure, self-hosted personal budgeting application with intelligent transfer linking, budget forecasting, debt tracking, and SimpleFIN integration for automated bank data import. Offline-first PWA. SQLite included — no external database required.
IMPORTANT: Before starting the container, generate your security keys: cd /mnt/user/repos/BudgetApp ./scripts/setup/generate-keys.sh production
This creates the secrets/production/ directory with all cryptographic key files. Point the Secrets Path config below at that folder, then back up master_secret.txt.
Full documentation: https://github.com/mbutcher/BudgetApp/blob/main/docs/deployment/deployment.md
Container.Description: Secure self-hosted personal budgeting. Features: budget vs. actual tracking, debt payoff planner with amortization, savings goals, SimpleFIN bank import, multi-user households, passkey authentication, and an offline-capable PWA. SQLite built in — no separate database server required.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port for BudgetApp. Point Nginx Proxy Manager at this port. Change it if 13911 is already in use.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: SQLite database file location. Also used for other app data.

Config.Name: Secrets Path
Config.Description: Directory containing cryptographic key files generated by setup-prod.sh. Must contain: jwt_secret.txt, encryption_key.txt, password_pepper.txt, db_password.txt, master_secret.txt, backup_encryption_key.txt

Config.Name: Logs Path
Config.Description: Application log files.

Config.Name: Uploads Path
Config.Description: User-uploaded attachments.

Config.Name: App URL
Config.Description: The full public URL users reach BudgetApp at, including protocol. Examples: https://budget.yourdomain.com | http://192.168.1.100:13911

Config.Name: WebAuthn RP ID
Config.Description: Bare hostname only — no protocol, no port. Must match the domain in App URL. Used for passkey authentication.

Config.Name: WebAuthn Origin
Config.Description: Must exactly match App URL (protocol + hostname, no trailing slash).

Config.Name: CORS Origin
Config.Description: Allowed CORS origin. Set to the same value as App URL.

Config.Name: Database Engine
Config.Description: sqlite3 (built-in, recommended) | mysql2 (MariaDB) | pg (PostgreSQL)

Config.Name: SQLite File Path
Config.Description: SQLite only: path to the database file inside the container. Leave as default unless you have a reason to change it.

Config.Name: DB Host
Config.Description: MariaDB/PostgreSQL only: hostname or IP address of the database server.

Config.Name: DB Port
Config.Description: MariaDB/PostgreSQL only: database server port (MariaDB default: 3306, PostgreSQL default: 5432). Leave blank for SQLite.

Config.Name: DB Name
Config.Description: MariaDB/PostgreSQL only: name of the database.

Config.Name: DB User
Config.Description: MariaDB/PostgreSQL only: database username.

Config.Name: Node Environment
Config.Description: Application environment. Leave as 'production'.

Config.Name: Internal App Port
Config.Description: Port the Express server listens on inside the container. nginx proxies to this. Do not change.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Log verbosity: error | warn | info | debug

Config.Name: SimpleFIN API URL
Config.Description: SimpleFIN bridge endpoint. Only change this if you are self-hosting SimpleFIN Bridge.

Config.Name: VAPID Public Key
Config.Description: Optional: VAPID public key for push notifications. Generate with: npx web-push generate-vapid-keys

Config.Name: VAPID Private Key
Config.Description: Optional: VAPID private key for push notifications.

Config.Name: VAPID Email
Config.Description: Optional: Contact email for VAPID push notifications. Format: mailto:you@example.com
